sobre.metaDescription: Astrobotanica is run by Pedro, a researcher in the field, covering bench research and the journey of plants beyond Earth.
sobre.title: Ship's log
sobre.intro: Astrobotanica is run by Pedro, a researcher in the field, covering everything from bench research — plant growth-promoting rhizobacteria, graphene oxide, cultivation in lunar regolith — to the history and future of taking plants beyond Earth. The project is, first and foremost, a written science communication space; alongside it, the same topics turn into long-form conversation on the podcast.
sobre.card1Body: Every article starts from topics that run through astrobotany research — not loose speculation.
sobre.card2Body: What is established science and what is speculation is always marked, never mixed together.
sobre.card3Body: Articles are the main format; the podcast dives deeper into the same topics in long-form conversation.
